delta.text: The
dialog is still showing. It seems the "文件夹" button click
didn't dismiss the dialog — it might be a toggle or label. Looking
at the dialog notes: "创建文件夹时不会含有文
件扩展名" (folders won't have file extensions). The "文件夹" button likely
creates the folder directly. Let me try clicking it using
coordinates from XML.

content.text: The dialog is still showing. It seems the "文件夹" button click didn't dismiss the dialog — it might be a toggle or label. Looking at the dialog notes: "创建文件夹时不会含有文件扩展名" (folders won't have file extensions). The "文件夹" button likely creates the folder directly. Let me try clicking it using coordinates from XML.

content.text:
The XML doesn't show the "文件夹", "取消", "确定" buttons — they're in the dialog button bar which is outside the scroll area. The buttons are likely at the bottom of the dialog. The "文件夹" button in Markor's new file dialog creates a folder instead of a file. Let me scroll down on the dialog to see if there's content below, or try clicking the button area which should be around y=1100-1179 based on the dialog bounds. Let me try clicking the "文件夹" button by its approximate position using the dialog bounds (bottom of the dialog panel).

The dialog goes from top=383 to bottom=1179. The buttons should be in the area around y=1100-1150. "文件夹" is on the left side. Let me click it precisely.
